one_liner: DE +2.2% to $627 — RSI 70.1 at overbought threshold, close above upper BB, and DCF shows -215% overvaluation; momentum is stretched.

price_action.intraday_story: DE closed just below the $628 high on below-average volume — overbought RSI 70 with a close above the upper BB ($628.62) on low volume is a classic distribution signal.

news_catalyst.headline: No Specific Catalyst — Agricultural Equipment Sector Participating in Broad Market Rally
news_catalyst.summary: DE is rising with the market. Deere benefits from farmer equipment replacement cycles and precision agriculture AI technology. No specific company news.

technical.summary: RSI 70.1 is the overbought threshold. Close above upper BB on below-average volume = low-conviction overbought extension. DCF at $199 shows -215% overvaluation. This is a momentum stock with no fundamental support at current prices.

wyckoff_narrative: No Wyckoff signals. The RSI 70 overbought condition on low volume suggests distribution into the rally rather than institutional accumulation.

valuation.summary: DCF at $199 — DE is trading at 3x fair value on a traditional DCF basis. The precision agriculture premium is not justified by current earnings growth.

key_strengths: Precision agriculture AI is a genuine long-term growth opportunity
Dominant market position in large farm equipment
key_concerns: Grade D fundamentals — agricultural cycle is near peak
fundamentals.summary: Grade D with significant DCF overvaluation. Avoid at current prices.

risks: RSI 70 overbought — historically followed by 5–10% pullbacks even in uptrends
DCF overvaluation leaves no fundamental floor on a correction
Agricultural commodity cycle turning — farm equipment orders slowing
